questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
How is C related to D?
1) Sister
2) Grandmother
3) Mother
4) Cousin
5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Which of the following is a pair of married couples?
DAD
2) BC
3) AC
4) BE
5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Which among the following will be in the second place if all the members of the family are arranged in the descending order of their weight?
1) J
2) A
3) C
4) Data inadequate
5) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Which of the following pairs of students could be on the same team as John?
1) B and E
2) E and F
3) K and C
4) K and L
5) J and M

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Any of the following pairs of students could be on the Blue Team EXCEPT
1) B and M
2) D and E
3) E and J
4) J and M
5) M and F

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If B and M are on the Red Team, then which of the following must be true?
1) C is on the Blue Team.
2) D is on the Blue Team.
3) D is on the Green Team.
4) K is on the Blue Team.
5) M is on the Green Team.

choices.a: C is on the Blue Team
choices.b: D is on the Blue Team
choices.c: D is on the Green Team
choices.d: K is on the Blue Team
choices.e: M is on the Green Team

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If F is the only male on his team, which of the following pairs could be other members of his team?
1) K and J
2) L and M
3) L and K
4) M and J
5) M and K

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
If B and F are on the Red Team, then which of the following is NOT an acceptable assignment of students for the other two teams?
Blue Team    Green Team
1) C,E,L     D,J,M
2) E,J,L     C,D,M
3) L,E,K     C,D,J
4) L,M,E     J,C,D
5) K,L,E     M,D,C
